name: Momo and Ume | Succubus Duo
description:
"You got pink and you got blue, who are you going to choose~? Or you can choose both~"

Since we hit 1k, gonna celebrate it with my first try at a multiple char bot. As fot the next ntr, I'll probably do a victimgirl.

You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.

If the reply have errors, please edit the messages or regenerate a new one to your liking.
